title: DMF Jajpur Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 35 Specialist Doctor Posts
description: District Mineral Foundation, Jajpur (DMF Jajpur) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 35 Specialist Doctor Jobs. Those candidates who have completed their MBBS, MD/ MS can use this opportunity and apply for the DMF Jajpur Notification 2026 . Here we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026...
